---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve voxtty
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description
A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Run `voxtty ...`
2. Do '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

## Environment
- **voxtty version**: `voxtty --version`
- **OS**: (e.g., Ubuntu 24.04)
- **Backend**: (whisper.cpp / Speaches / OpenAI / ElevenLabs)
- **Mode**: (standard / realtime)
- **Installation method**: (Debian package / cargo build)

## Debug Output
Run with `--debug` flag and paste relevant output:
```
voxtty --debug ...
```

## Additional Context
Any other context, screenshots, or information that might help.

## Checklist
- [ ] I searched existing issues to avoid duplicates
- [ ] I included debug output
- [ ] I verified my backend is running (if applicable)
